{{Quote|The Briil twins are dead; they shot it out with a patrol cruiser out in the Tion Hegemony.|Han Solo|<ref name="hsr" />}}
'''Rewinda Briil''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who, along with their [[Twin/Legends|twin]] [[Lozira Briil|Lozira]], worked as part of an underworld crew led by [[Roa]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. In that [[Time/Legends|time]] the Briils worked alongside fellow smugglers [[Tregga/Legends|Tregga]] and [[Vonzel/Legends|Vonzel]], and eventually, partners [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]],<ref name="hsr" /> who went on to great fame as [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] heroes.<ref name="aoc">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref> However, the Briil twins' careers were cut short some time before [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], when they were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a battle with a patrol [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]].<ref name="hsr" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lozira Briil was first mentioned in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="hsr" /> Briil's first name, and that of their sibling, was later given in [[1993]]'s ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''.<ref name="css">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>
